title: Better Paint
description: The resource pack adds hand-drawn, simple cartoon textures for a comfortable gaming experience)
body:
![Avatar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4890e4a1e3e23c5686fd42073f604cda162caa94.png)
![raz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbb5e1cd60c5ffd76c46b2fc54cc180dcab03186.png)

<details>
<summary>Secret</summary>

This Resource Pack will be updated for 100 downloads!

</details>
 
**Tired of the excessive detail of blocks in vanilla Minecraft?** This resource pack is for you! It adds very **cool, cartoonish, hand-drawn textures** to **almost every block and mobs**. Also in the **2.0 - Simple Mobs update**, I changed the **texture of the buttons in the main and other menus in minecraft!**, and in the **2.1 update - "Font Update"**, I have added **your favorite font**,and I have **added new pictures!** If you want to see them, **download them or go to the gallery)**
I spent **one month** creating this resource pack. To be honest, I took some textures from another resource pack and redesigned them to my liking. **I don't plan to stop** at just one release, as some people do. Instead, I will consistently **release updates, additions, and more**. 
![df](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbb5e1cd60c5ffd76c46b2fc54cc180dcab03186.png)
If you have any **questions, or if you want to add something or participate in the improvement and further development of the resource pack,** feel free to contact me in **private messages** on **Discord!** **@olezek_kiroezek2013** or my [Discord-channel](https://discord.gg/tgEnDP9d2c)
![gh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbb5e1cd60c5ffd76c46b2fc54cc180dcab03186.png)

# Rules:
![ыв](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbb5e1cd60c5ffd76c46b2fc54cc180dcab03186.png)
By using this resource pack, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions
- ItzMyDreams or olezek_kiroezek is the creator and copyright owner of this resource pack
- These terms are subject to change at any time
- These terms only apply if you intend to use the resource pack in your own content you want to share publicly
- The terms listed on the official project CurseForge and Modrinth pages, supersede any license, readme or terms/conditions information provided anywhere else, including in the resource pack files
- If you use assets from this resource pack in your own, credit is required. Preferably including its name and a link to an official CurseForge or Modrinth page
- The creator has the final say about which terms apply to your use of this resource pack and its assets
![sdfg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbb5e1cd60c5ffd76c46b2fc54cc180dcab03186.png)
## **With this resource pack, YOU MAY:**

- modify the resource pack if it's for personal use only, meaning you cannot share it publicly
- include this resource pack in your mod pack or server
- use this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts
- use an edited version of this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts, if the edited version is not publicly available
- remix, transform, and build upon its assets in your own resource pack, within reason, if credit is given
- earn money using remixed, transformed, and built upon assets in your own resource pack
![sdfb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbb5e1cd60c5ffd76c46b2fc54cc180dcab03186.png)
## **With this resource pack, YOU MAY NOT:**

- redistribute this resource pack
- port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition
- include unedited assets in your own resource pack, unless you have permission from the creator
- include assets from this resource pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission from the creator
